launch_shapes: Claude Code subagents through the Agent tool

verified_by: local: workflow-orchestrator probe list includes claude -p headless smoke test
notes: Use worker-led subagents for a few focused tasks; use dynamic workflows only when the plan benefits from script-managed fan-out.
Worktree isolation is an orchestrator pattern for writable independent tasks, not a native Claude Code subagent mechanism.
Use the Codex MCP config path or codex mcp tooling for live MCP changes.

local: optional external skills are symlinked under ~/.agents/skills
notes: Codex is the canonical generated skill-wrapper target for command sources.

launch_shapes: Codex prompt: spawn one agent per independent point, wait for all, and summarize
codex exec -C "$repo" -s read-only|workspace-write --json "<prompt>" for single role sessions
verified_by: local: codex exec --help is listed as a workflow-orchestrator probe before role assignment
notes: Codex spawns subagents only when explicitly asked; prompts must name the desired fan-out and require consolidation.
Custom agents can carry model and instruction overrides, but subagents inherit current sandbox and approval controls.
Worktree fan-out is an orchestrator isolation pattern for separate role sessions, not a Codex subagent mechanism.
Legacy transition target only. Gemini MCP settings are not merged by agent-surface install because settings.json may contain secrets.

headless_supported means legacy single-role CLI launch is available; worker-led subagent fan-out remains unknown.
Cline supports local stdio servers with command and args; keep auto-approval empty for optional services by default.

verified_by: local: ~/.cline/skills contains optional external skill symlinks

verified_by: local: no current Cline headless subagent fan-out probe recorded in this repo

Configured subagents can use dedicated models and permissions; prompt-level worker assignment must still keep filescope isolation explicit.
Workspace-root .kilocodeignore (gitignore syntax with negation). Legacy-supported and auto-migrated to kilo.jsonc deny rules. User-scope installs skip it as non-applicable.
